texto: As an umbrella term, we should think about social media and mobile behavior as it’s related to psychology, anthropology, communication, economics, human geography, ethnography, et al. After all, everything comes down to people.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brian Solisli sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “As an umbrella term, we should think about social media and mobile behavior as it’s related to ps…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, social-media, umbrella, útil em momentos de reflexao.
